task_completion.description: Verify that a Harvest log form is open or created in farmOS Field Kit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The farmOS Field Kit interface is visible, displaying a 'Harvest' log form or details screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the date is set to July 15, 2025.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date field in the log shows '2025-07-15' or 'July 15, 2025'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct notes are added to the log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The notes text area contains 'Garlic harvest trial. Comparing output between Upper and Lower fields.' (or at least the keyword 'Garlic harvest trial').

task_completion.description: Verify that the first quantity (Upper Field) is added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A quantity entry is visible with the value '450', unit 'bulbs', and label 'Upper Field'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the second quantity (Lower Field) is added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A second quantity entry is visible with the value '320', unit 'bulbs', and label 'Lower Field'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the graphical user interface to create the log.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the farmOS Field Kit web or app interface, not a terminal or API client.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual farmOS Field Kit application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application shown must be farmOS Field Kit, not a text editor or a mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify that the data was genuinely entered into the form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text and numbers should be inside the appropriate input fields, text areas, and quantity sections of the farmOS Field Kit form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Date: 2025-07-15. Expected Notes keyword: 'Garlic harvest trial'. Expected Quantities: 1) 450 bulbs labeled 'Upper Field', 2) 320 bulbs labeled 'Lower Field'.
